point_of_time_type.description: Type of the point of time. Possible values include: - `timestamp`: Exact time using the standard timezone format. Example: `2023-09-15 10:59:43`. - `offset`: Interval relative to 'now.' Example: `1 day`. - `statement`: ID of a query statement to use as the reference point for Time Travel. For more information, see https://docs.snowflake.com/en/sql-reference/data-types-datetime.

reference.description: Relation to the point of time. Currently, the API supports `at` and `before`.
